## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I ran `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] I ran `npm run test:imports`
- [ ] I ran `npm run test:upstream`
- [ ] I updated docs or examples if behavior changed
- [ ] I noted platform-specific implications if native code changed

## Testing details

Include relevant commands, environments, and outputs.

## Migration impact

Explain whether this changes `ldapts` compatibility, native build behavior, or npm release behavior.
